source_old_req: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper subprogram shall guarantee that, for each invocation, the output parameters gyro_out_data_x, gyro_out_data_y, and gyro_out_data_z are valid values of type AHRS::Data_Types::FLOAT32_TYPE_AADL. These outputs shall be deterministically derived from the input parameters of the called subprogram AHRS::Subprograms::GYRO_SUB, ensuring that the values of gyro_out_data_x, gyro_out_data_y, and gyro_out_data_z remain consistent with the corresponding outputs from the GYRO_SUB implementation at each invocation. The implementation layer GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i shall maintain correct data flow such that the output parameters gyro_out_data_x, gyro_out_data_y, and gyro_out_data_z are properly mapped to the respective outputs of the GYRO_SUB subprogram call.
natural_requirement: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i. In the implementation layer, GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i shall route data flow from Spg.gyro_out_data_x to Gyro_Out_Data_X through P1 and data flow from Spg.gyro_out_data_Y to Gyro_Out_Data_Y through P2.

requirement_items.text: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.gyro_out_data_x to Gyro_Out_Data_X through connection P1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P1 from Spg.gyro_out_data_x to Gyro_Out_Data_X.

requirement_items.text: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.gyro_out_data_Y to Gyro_Out_Data_Y through connection P2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P2 from Spg.gyro_out_data_Y to Gyro_Out_Data_Y.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P1 from Spg.gyro_out_data_x to Gyro_Out_Data_X. The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall declare connection P2 from Spg.gyro_out_data_Y to Gyro_Out_Data_Y.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.gyro_out_data_x to Gyro_Out_Data_X through connection P1. The GYRO_SUB_wrapper.i implementation shall route the data flow from Spg.gyro_out_data_Y to Gyro_Out_Data_Y through connection P2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
